pcfControls.description: Use this control to enable address autocomplete feature powered by Bing Maps API

fields.description: Unique identifier of the account with which the invoice is associated.
Value of the Actual Opportunity Commission in base currency.
Specifies the actual amount applied to Sales Rep Commission.
Value of the Actual Total Commission in base currency.
Value of the Additional Fees in base currency.
Value of the Amount Paid in base currency.
Value of the Balance in base currency.
Specifies the first part of the commissionable amount.
Value of the Commissionable Amount (1) in base currency.
Specifies the second part of the commissionable amount.
Value of the Commissionable Amount (2) in base currency.
Specifies the commission (1) percentage.
Specifies the commission (2) percentage.
Specifies the amount of Discretionary Discount
Value of the Discretionary Discount Amt in base currency.
Value of the Estimated Opportunity Commission in base currency.
Specifies an alert to the user opening the Invoice
Represents the date the Opportunity was invoiced
Determines whether to apply value towards MASE for Commissionable Amount 1
Determines whether Commissionable Amount 2 should be MASE
Specifies the number of payments the invoice will be split into.
New field to track the percentage paid for an invoice.
Date the Invoice was marked as Paid
Specifies the invoice payments have already been split, so no further payments can be made.
Specifies the type of payment the customer specified to pay the invoice with.
Purchase Order number from the Customer
Specifies the date the Purchase Order was received from the Customer
Represents the date the invoice was generated in Quickbooks
Quote Number carried over from the Quote
Unique identifier of the System User (Sales Rep) the Invoice is associated with.
Value of the Total Amount Paid in base currency.
Represents the total commissionable amount minus any Additional Fees
Value of the Total Commissionable Amount in base currency.
Type the first line of the customer's billing address.
Type the second line of the customer's billing address.
Type the third line of the billing address.
Type a name for the customer's billing address, such as "Headquarters" or "Field office", to identify the address.
Type the ZIP Code or postal code for the billing address.
Type the state or province for the billing address.
Unique identifier of the contact associated with the invoice.
Date and time when the record was created.
Select the customer account or contact to provide a quick link to additional customer details, such as account information, activities, and opportunities.
Type additional information to describe the invoice, such as shipping details or product substitutions.
Type the discount amount for the invoice if the customer is eligible for special savings.
Enter the date by which the invoice should be paid by the customer.
The default image for the entity.
Type the cost of freight or shipping for the products included in the invoice for use in calculating the total amount due.
Unique identifier of the invoice.
Shows the identifying number or code of the invoice.
Date and time when the record was modified.
Type a descriptive name for the invoice.
Choose the opportunity that the invoice is related to for reporting and analytics.
Owner Id
Select the payment terms to indicate when the customer needs to pay the total amount.
Choose the price list associated with this record to make sure the products associated with the campaign are offered at the correct prices.
Choose the order related to the invoice to make sure the order is fulfilled and invoiced correctly.
Select a shipping method for deliveries sent to this address.
Type the first line of the customer's shipping address.
Type the second line of the customer's shipping address.
Type the third line of the shipping address.
Type a name for the customer's shipping address, such as "Headquarters" or "Field office",  to identify the address.
Type the ZIP Code or postal code for the shipping address.
Type the state or province for the shipping address.
Shows whether the invoice is active, paid, or canceled. Paid and canceled invoices are read-only and can't be edited unless they are reactivated.
Select the invoice's status.
Shows the total amount due, calculated as the sum of the products, discount, freight, and taxes for the invoice.
Shows the total of the Tax amounts specified on all products included in the invoice, included in the Total Amount due calculation for the invoice.
Choose the local currency for the record to make sure budgets are reported in the correct currency.
